mapper.select: SELECT s.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, s.quantity AS quantity, s.min_stock AS minStock, s.max_stock AS maxStock, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM stock s INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = s.product_id ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT s.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, s.quantity AS quantity, s.min_stock AS minStock, s.max_stock AS maxStock, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM stock s INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE s.product_id = #{productId}
SELECT id AS id, product_id AS productId, quantity AS quantity, min_stock AS minStock, max_stock AS maxStock, update_time AS updateTime FROM stock WHERE product_id = #{productId}
